hypothesis: default exponential decay baseline
quadratic decay (a*(1-lam*a/combined)) for power-law tail, reduced lambdas, higher alpha
quadratic decay + impact floor (floor never activates, same as exp_0001)
quadratic decay + exp(alpha*impact) protection, alpha=2.0, higher lambdas for differentiation
cubic decay (a^3 rate) with exp impact, recall near max 0.494 but corr crashed to 0.058
type-differentiated: cubic facts + quadratic episodes. same overall, different balance (recall 0.408, corr 0.293)
equilibrium-based decay converging to impact-dependent target. convergence too slow for high-impact items, poor correlation
cubic + boosted reinforcement (3x gains, 3x slower stability_decay). reactivation too rare to matter
quartic decay (a^4 rate). max recall at all thresholds but corr dropped to 0.040, net negative
